title: Verify existing implementation of auth middleware
description: Auth middleware already exists at src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts with comprehensive tests. The implementation validates JWT tokens via Bearer scheme, returns 401 for invalid/missing/expired tokens, attaches user info to AuthContext, and is composable via createAuthMiddleware factory. Unit tests cover: valid token passes with user attached, missing token returns 401, invalid token returns 401, expired token returns 401. Additional coverage includes session revocation and generation mismatch checks.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts - JWT signing/verification with TokenPayload type
src/auth/withAuth.ts - Auth HOC wrapping route handlers with JWT validation
src/utils/result.ts - Result discriminated union for error handling
